name: Chicken Enchiladas II
recipeIngredient: 12 Corn tortillas, torn into small pieces
1 can Green chili peppers, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cooked chicken, cream of chicken soup, milk, chopped onion, and green chili peppers in a bowl.
2. In a casserole dish, place a layer of tortillas, followed by a layer of the chicken mixture, and then a layer of grated Swiss cheese.
3. Repeat the layers, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
4. Bake at 350°F until hot and the cheese is melted.
